title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
ABB India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
